words.def: a hard malleable ductile silvery metallic element that is resistant to corrosion; used in alloys; occurs in pentlandite and smaltite and garnierite and millerite
words.zh: n. 鎳, 鎳幣, 五分鎳幣
a. 相似的, 同樣的

words.def: a city in southeastern France on the Mediterranean; the leading resort on the French Riviera
words.zh: a. 美好的, 和藹的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 細微的, 挑剔的, 謹慎的

words.def: a formation of people or things one beside another
words.zh: n. 列, 線, 繩, 電線, 線路, 路線, 航線, 作業線, 界線, 戰線, 外形, 排, 家系

words.def: water frozen in the solid state
words.zh: n. 冰, 冰淇淋, 糖衣, 冷若冰霜, 矜持, 賄賂
